sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Lecce is in poor form with 4 consecutive losses and no wins in their last 5 matches, conceding 8 goals. Bologna, on the other hand, has a mixed run with 2 wins and 3 losses in their last 5, showing better attacking intent but struggling defensively with no clean sheets in recent games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 2 encounters between Lecce and Bologna, the matches have been low-scoring, with a 0-0 draw and a 1-0 Bologna victory. Bologna holds a strong historical edge with no losses in their last 9 meetings against Lecce.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Lecce's season stats reveal a struggling attack (2 goals scored, 16th rank) and a leaky defense (8 conceded, 16th rank). Bologna, positioned 11th with 6 points, has a slightly better output (3 goals scored) and defensive record, indicating a marginal edge.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Lecce's inability to create big chances (19th rank) and convert opportunities contrasts with Bologna's slight dominance in possession and final third entries. The referee's tendency to issue around 4.8 yellow cards per game suggests a potentially physical match.
